abilities.description: Reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your library.
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature.
Until end of turn, creatures you control gain "You may have this creature assign its combat damage as though it weren't blocked."

effect.description: Until end of turn, creatures you control gain "You may have this creature assign its combat damage as though it weren't blocked."
effect.name: AnimateAll
